'''Trol''' was a teenage [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was living on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] during the early part of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], he was one of the twenty-six [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] resistance fighters that served under [[Morgan Katarn]] at the [[Geothermal tap|G-Tap]]; armed with an [[SLM]] launcher, he and his companion [[Jen (Human)|Jen]] were part of the missile team.

[[Vester]]'s [[Light freighter/Legends|Corellian light freighter]] approached and Morgan ordered the pair to destroy that assault ship. Jen loaded his tube and Trol attempted to get a lock, hidden behind some boulders. The SLM hit the underside of the ship but [[Vester]], its experienced pilot, returned it to its position. Trol felt anxiety while Jen loaded a second missile; once it was launched, the missile was hit by a laser, and the explosion killed the pair.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
